description: Tech Insight Loop legacy asset inventory and import boundary contract.

first_round_completed.scope: source governance and structured content admission scoring only

inventory_outputs.write_policy: reports only; do not write legacy SQLite or InfoWatchtower application database

dry_run_outputs.write_policy: reports only; do not write legacy SQLite or InfoWatchtower application database
dry_run_outputs.scope: plan articles and daily/weekly reports before real historical import

actual_import.article_target: raw_items via a disabled legacy_tech_insight_loop archive data source
actual_import.idempotency: upsert by archive data_source_id + legacy entry_key for raw_items and by legacy_system + legacy_table + legacy_id for historical_reports

entity_import.default_mode: no write; prints inventory review instruction
entity_import.idempotency: upsert by legacy_system + legacy_table + legacy_id for tracked_entities and entity_milestones
lineage_resolution: entity_milestones.entity_id resolves to tracked_entities via legacy ai_entities.id
entity_milestones.article_id resolves to imported raw_items when historical articles have already been imported
entity_milestones.report_id resolves to historical_reports when historical reports have already been imported
entity_import.unresolved_ref_policy: keep the milestone and write unresolved legacy references to metadata_json.legacy_refs

quality_archive_import.default_mode: no write; prints inventory review instruction
quality_archive_import.idempotency: upsert by legacy_system + legacy_table + legacy_id for historical_feedback_items and historical_job_runs
lineage_resolution: feedback.article_id resolves to imported raw_items when historical articles have already been imported
article_quality_feedback.article_id resolves to imported raw_items when historical articles have already been imported
jobs are imported as statistics-only records and do not create ingestion_runs
quality_archive_import.unresolved_ref_policy: keep the feedback item and write unresolved legacy article references to metadata_json.legacy_refs

archive_read_api.write_policy: read-only; must not trigger import, recommendation, daily/weekly adoption or company SQL export

entity_read_api.write_policy: read-only; must not trigger import, recommendation, daily/weekly adoption or company SQL export

quality_archive_read_api.write_policy: read-only; must not trigger import, mutate current comments/ratings/ingestion_runs, recommendation, daily/weekly adoption or company SQL export

legacy_import_read_api.purpose: read current InfoWatchtower database after explicit --execute imports and compare actual imported rows with frozen Tech Insight Loop baseline counts
legacy_import_read_api.write_policy: read-only; must not execute import scripts, mutate archived rows, trigger recommendation or export company SQL

legacy_import_verification.default_mode: no write; prints check-only and small-limit execution guidance
legacy_import_verification.full_import_guard: --confirm-full-import is required when execute limits are omitted
legacy_import_verification.purpose: run small-batch or full real-database import acceptance and emit the same coverage/gap summary used by /api/legacy-import/summary and /api/legacy-import/gaps

articles.target: raw_items; optional archived news_items in a later batch

reports.target: historical_reports archive; optional daily_reports / weekly_reports views later
reports.lineage: source_article_ids_json resolves primarily to legacy articles.id; article_id text is a fallback
reports.reason: legacy reports can have multiple reports for the same day/week, so the lossless first import target is historical_reports rather than the current one-report-per-day/week tables
must_not: use standard company SQL export scope

ai_entities.lineage: full legacy row is preserved in metadata_json.legacy_tech_insight_loop

lineage: article_id -> articles.id and imported raw_items when available
report_id -> reports.id and historical_reports when available

feedback.lineage: article_id -> articles.id and imported raw_items when available

article_quality_feedback.lineage: article_id -> articles.id and imported raw_items when available

jobs.rule: migrate statistics and failure reasons only; do not migrate the old task state machine

guardrails: InfoWatchtower remains the only runtime system
do not run Tech Insight Loop app.py
do not copy SQLite tables into PostgreSQL with the same names
historical imported assets are not candidates for current daily recommendation by default
historical imported assets are not exported by standard company SQL
generated_news.category remains the current ten-class taxonomy
generated_news.content_json remains the five-field company SQL shape
